title: Pacing formula to keep track of deliverables based on the date

posts.author: MariaRH (Maria de Bofarull)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I’m trying to add a formula to my board to help me keep track of the pacing for the deliverables in the company for the month.
The x would be the number we should have delivered by now from a total considering today’s date.
I tried finding it online but I can’t seem to figure it out and would love some help!
Thanks!
